titles.title: Taikong Lixianji
Space Adventures
Star Field War Record Astro Plan
Xingyuan Zhanji
太空历险记
Astro Plan

data.title: Taikong Lixianji
data.title_japanese: 太空历险记
title_synonyms: Star Field War Record Astro Plan
data.synopsis:
In the year 2735, mankind has begun to venture into space to find a new home after Earth's environment succumbs to global warming and the bombardment of asteroids into the atmosphere. During their voyage, the Space Migration Fleet encounters an alien race from the planet Iccus. As raiders of natural resources, the aliens are bent on galactic domination. To combat the threat, six young fighters are recruited into the Sky Arrow Flight Team and are equipped with transformable Type Yi fighter planes.

(Source: Wikipedia)

titles.title: Crayon Shin-chan x Panpaka Pants: Aeon Cinema Manner Movie Collab
クレヨンしんちゃん×パンパカパンツ　イオンシネママナームービーコラボ

data.title: Crayon Shin-chan x Panpaka Pants: Aeon Cinema Manner Movie Collab
data.title_japanese: クレヨンしんちゃん×パンパカパンツ　イオンシネママナームービーコラボ
data.synopsis: A three-way collaboration between Crayon Shin-chan, Panpaka Pants, and the Aeon Cinema movie theater company. This short is promoting good theater etiquette as well as the 25th Crayon Shin-chan film "Shin-chan Shuurai! Uchuujin Shiriri" being released April 15th. The manner movie will be shown in Aeon cinemas nationwide starting March 18th and collaborative goods will be sold at participating Miraiya bookstores (also owned by the Aeon conglomerate).

titles.title: Matsue Kankou Taishi Sanri ga Iku! Matsue Ghost Tour
Eagle Talon
The Frogman Show
Taka no Tsume
松江観光大使3人が行く！松江ゴーストツアー

data.title: Matsue Kankou Taishi Sanri ga Iku! Matsue Ghost Tour
data.title_japanese: 松江観光大使3人が行く！松江ゴーストツアー
data.synopsis:
An accompaniment to Heisei Matsue Kaidan: Ayashi. This ghost tour takes a more realistic approach featuring Yoshia (the fictional Eagle Talon character), Kihara Hirokatsu (horror and mystery novelist), Chafurin (voice actor and Shimae Prefecture ambassador), and Frogman (Ryou Ono's caricature; real-life director of the anime studio DLE). The quartet travels around Matsue City exploring horror/haunted real life locations talking about the history and how it became a paranormal focus.

The end of the episode promotes ticket sale and times for a real ghost tour watchers can partake in.

data.title: Yoshida no Matsue Beauty Daisakusen
data.title_japanese: 吉田の松江ビューティー大作戦
data.synopsis: A Matsue City collaboration anime with Eagle Talon. Yoshida and Hifumi Arai go exploring the city for these beautifying locations. All 3 episodes (and the prologue) were uploaded on the same day but then a bit later episode 2 and 3 were removed. They were then reuploaded the week after and the week after that, as a minor semblance to a weekly released series instead.

titles.title: Warau Salesman Special Program
Warau Salesman Tokubetsu Bangumi
Warau Salesman Specials
笑ゥせぇるすまん 特別番組

data.title: Warau Salesman Special Program
data.title_japanese: 笑ゥせぇるすまん 特別番組
data.synopsis: A special program of Warau Salesman, these episodes were released in a blast format on 3 days in a nearly 2 hour long timeslot each. The individual episodes have their own OPs. The first blast release differed from the main series by having live-action footage of real locations in Japan before delving into the story for each episode. The 2nd had Moguro with the Master interacting with the viewer as if behind the scenes for a studio before delving into each episode. And the 3rd had Moguro and the Master playing outside in the snow as if reporting on an on-location event to the viewer before delving into each episode.

titles.title: Kimi no Hikari: Asagao to Kase-san.
Morning Glory and Kase-san
キミノヒカリ ～あさがおと加瀬さん。～
Your Light: Kase-san and Morning Glories

data.title: Kimi no Hikari: Asagao to Kase-san.
data.title_english: Your Light: Kase-san and Morning Glories
data.title_japanese: キミノヒカリ ～あさがおと加瀬さん。～
data.synopsis:
"Please. I hope Kase-san likes me..."

Yamada is a shy second-year high school girl who is a member of the greenery committee. Kase from the class next to hers is a beautiful girl who is the ace of the school's track team. As a result of the morning glories planted by Yamada, the distance between the two people who have never exchanged words shrinks little by little.

(Source: Pony Canyon)
data.background: Kimi no Hikari: Asagao to Kase-san. is a promotional video of Hiromi Takashima's Asagao to Kase-san. manga, the first installment of the Kase-san Series. It features Hanako Oku's song titled "Kimi no Egao (album ver.)" from the 2012 album good-bye. Kimi no Hikari was first released on the YouTube channel of Anime Pony Canyon on May 7, 2017. It was later bundled as a Blu-ray disc with Apron to Kase-san., the fourth manga volume in the series, on July 25, 2017.
